overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through Night City's Arasaka Waterfront district. The player character walks along sunlit sidewalks past futuristic skyscrapers and industrial buildings, passes beneath an elevated highway overpass, and crosses into an open plaza area dominated by the massive Arasaka Tower in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban sidewalk with industrial warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk in bright morning sunlight, passing pedestrians and approaching the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal jacket and shorts jogging past the camera
pedestrian in white shirt walking away in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: gray concrete warehouse building with metal roll-up doors and yellow trim
low-rise orange commercial building with RC signage and graffiti
massive steel and concrete highway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall futuristic skyscraper with distinctive spires dominating the skyline
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit sidewalk in a futuristic urban district. The camera moves forward past a concrete industrial building on the right and an orange commercial building on the left. In the distance, the massive Arasaka Tower rises against a clear blue sky, while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk along the street, and palm trees line the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk entering the shadow of elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: entering the deep shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to shade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment becomes increasingly shaded by the overhead structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair leaning against the building wall

entered.detail: street-side advertising stand with illuminated poster displays
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as the scene transitions into the shadow of the massive highway overpass. The lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to a darker, sheltered environment. An advertising kiosk appears on the right sidewalk, and green metal railings line the left side of the path. The Arasaka Tower remains visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection beneath elevated highway with traffic

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection as vehicles pass through beneath the overpass
turning slightly to the right while navigating the crosswalk to avoid traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the street under the overpass while monitoring passing vehicles and following the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
silver truck waiting at the traffic light before proceeding

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with green light illuminated
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
covered bus stop structure with glass panels

segments.scene_description: Now fully beneath the elevated highway, the camera navigates a street intersection with dim lighting. The ego crosses the road using the marked crosswalk while vehicles drive through the intersection. Traffic lights and street signs become prominent, and the environment takes on an industrial, shadowed character with concrete pillars supporting the overhead roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching Arasaka Waterfront complex

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into the open plaza with direct sunlight and clear view of Arasaka Tower

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious open plaza toward the Arasaka Waterfront entrance with minimal pedestrian traffic

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Arasaka Waterfront' mounted on a building facade
contemporary commercial building with clean lines and large windows
wide open pedestrian plaza leading toward the main Arasaka complex

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the shadow of the overpass into a bright, open plaza. The Arasaka Tower now dominates the center view, much closer and more detailed. The Arasaka Waterfront sign is visible on the left, marking the entrance to the corporate district. The environment shifts from industrial and enclosed to corporate and spacious, with modern glass buildings and clear morning sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sunlit urban sidewalk through a shadowed industrial underpass and into a vast corporate plaza. It begins on a bright street lined with palm trees and colorful commercial buildings, moving toward a looming highway overpass with the distant Arasaka Tower silhouetted against a clear blue sky. As the camera passes beneath the overpass, the lighting shifts abruptly from natural sunlight to a dim, sheltered environment characterized by concrete pillars, advertising kiosks, and green metal railings. The scene then navigates a shadowed street intersection and a marked crosswalk amidst flowing traffic before emerging from the darkness into a bright, open space. Finally, the environment expands into the spacious Arasaka Waterfront district, where the massive Arasaka Tower dominates the view surrounded by modern glass architecture and brilliant morning light.
